# driveco-qa-pipeline

Local QA pipeline for Driveco support calls.

## Summary

The project retrieves call history from a Cloudflare worker, enriches selected calls with Aircall AI transcripts, analyzes them locally with Ollama, then publishes daily and weekly QA reports.

## Main docs

- README.md
- ARCHITECTURE.md
- RUNBOOK.md
- CLAUDE.md

## Main entrypoints

- analysis_pipeline.py
- call_fetcher.py
- call_classifier.py
- ollama_client.py
- metrics_builder.py
- report_formatter.py

## Operational note

On macOS, automation does not run directly from the source repository. It runs from a synced runtime under:

- ~/Library/Application Support/driveco-qa-pipeline/runtime

After source changes, resync with:

```bash
bash sync_launchd_runtime.sh
bash setup_launchd.sh
```
